prompt.content:
The Decision has been made that the role will be based in Paris, which will significantly change the travel dynamics, Let’s exclude any candidates for whom this could be concern. Candidates identified to have no or limited international experience should get their average cultural fit score lowered by 2. Check the cultural fit assessments for candidate concerns. 

After applying these changes, re-rank the candidates in the exec comparison matrix using the following weights in the overall score:
-	Avg Skill Rating – 30%
-	Avg Overall Interview – 10%
-	Avg Cultural Fit – 30%
-	Experience Score – 20% (needs to be converted from 0-1 to 0-10 scale)
-	Skill Score – 10% (needs to be converted from 0-1 to 0-10 scale)

Please state in the console what rank Rachel Moore would hold in the updated executive candidate comparison matrix.

rubrics.name: States the new rank that Rachel Moore would occupy in the updated executive... (ver_590872e01407408983daa2814139d1e6)

messages.content: States the new rank that Rachel Moore would occupy in the updated executive candidate compensation matrix in the overall score is 24.

golden_responses.golden_text_response: The new place in the exec compensation matrix that Rachel Moore would occupy, given the changes and assigning the new weights in the overall score is 24
